> Organisational visualisation widgets (roadmap, etc.)

Currently provides a roadmap timeline widget that renders project milestones and tasks on a visual timeline.

## Key features

* **Roadmap timeline widget** -- JavaScript-based canvas rendering of project timelines
* **Configurable status colors** -- customise the visual appearance of timeline items
* **JSON DSL adapter** -- declarative data binding for widget configuration
* **Example configurations** -- included examples to get started quickly

## Prerequisites

* json-dsl plugin must be installed

## Quick start

Use the roadmap widget with a JSON data source. See the included examples for configuration patterns.

## License

MIT -- see [LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md)

<$fill $name="body">

!! Rendering pipeline

# `execute()` — reads widget attributes (`source`, `width`, `height`, `autoHeight`, `class`)
# `readSpec()` — resolves the JSON source (tiddler lookup or wikitext render), parses and normalizes
# `normalizeSpec()` — validates and coerces all fields, defaults `now` to today
# `renderChart()` — builds the entire SVG DOM tree: grid, lanes, tasks, milestones, legend

!! Components

|!Component |!File |!Role |
|`widget.js` |`roadmap/v1/widget.js` |Main `<$resourceplanning>` widget — SVG builder |
|`json-dsl-adapter.tid` |`roadmap/v1/json-dsl-adapter.tid` |High-level `<$rrjd.*>` wikitext widgets wrapping json-dsl |
|`config-status-colors.tid` |`roadmap/v1/config-status-colors.tid` |Default status color mapping (user-overridable) |

!! JSON spec structure

```json
{
  "title": "string",
  "start": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "end": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "now": "YYYY-MM-DD (optional, defaults to today)",
  "lanes": [{
    "name": "string",
    "maxRows": "number (default 1)",
    "progressText": "string (optional)",
    "tiddler": "string (optional, nav target)",
    "people": [{
      "name": "string",
      "involvement": "number (0-100)",
      "avatarUrl": "string (optional)",
      "tiddler": "string (optional)"
    }]
  }],
  "tasks": [{
    "label": "string",
    "start": "YYYY-MM-DD",
    "end": "YYYY-MM-DD",
    "status": "planned|in_progress|done|blocked|candidate",
    "lane": "string (must match a lane name)",
    "rowOffset": "number (default 0, for stacking)",
    "tiddler": "string (optional)",
    "milestoneAtEnd": "string (optional label)"
  }],
  "milestones": [{
    "label": "string",
    "when": "YYYY-MM-DD",
    "lane": "string (optional, null = full-height)",
    "color": "string (default #cc0000)",
    "tiddler": "string (optional)"
  }]
}
```

!! Auto-fit height

When `autoHeight="yes"` (the default), the SVG height is computed as:

```
canvasH = gridY + computeGridHeight() + 10
```

This ensures the chart is exactly tall enough for its lanes and legend, regardless of the `height` attribute. Set `autoHeight="no"` to use the fixed `height` value.

!! Configurable status colors

At the start of `renderChart()`, the widget reads the tiddler `$:/config/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/status-colors`. If it exists and contains valid JSON, its keys are merged into the built-in color map:

|!Status |!Default color |
|`blocked` |`#cc0000` |
|`in_progress` |`#0070c0` |
|`done` |`#00a651` |
|`planned` |`#13a7e5` |
|`candidate` |`#6e7b8b` |

You can add custom status keys too — any task with a matching `status` field will use the configured color.

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="tip">
<$fill $name="body">
Edit the config tiddler `$:/config/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/status-colors` in the wiki to override colors. Changes take effect on next refresh — no restart needed.
</$fill>
</$transclude>

!! SVG tooltips

Native `<title>` elements are appended to:

|!Element |!Tooltip content |
|Task bars |Label, date range, status |
|People avatars |Name, involvement percentage |
|Milestone lines |Label, date |
|Lane rectangles |Lane name |

!! Design decisions

* ''Pure SVG'' — no external charting library; the widget builds SVG DOM nodes directly
* ''Wikitext source support'' — `readSpec()` falls back to `wiki.renderText()` if the source isn't a tiddler title, enabling transclusions and macros
* ''Click navigation via `tm-navigate`'' — standard TiddlyWiki navigation message, works with story rivers
* ''Clipped rendering'' — tasks partially outside the visible date range are clipped to the grid boundaries

</$fill>
</$transclude>

<$fill $name="body">

!! Basic roadmap from JSON tiddler

Create a data tiddler with `type: application/json` and the roadmap JSON, then render it:

```
<$resourceplanning source="MyRoadmap/data"/>
```

!! Using the JSON DSL adapter

Orga Tools ships with a [[JSON DSL|$:/plugins/rimir/json-dsl/doc/overview]] adapter — a set of `<$rrjd.*>` wikitext widgets that map 1:1 to the roadmap JSON structure. Under the hood, each widget creates `<$json-obj>`, `<$json-array>`, or `<$json-prop>` nodes.

Import the adapter and compose:

```
<$importvariables filter="[[$:/plugins/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/v1/json-dsl-adapter]]">

<$rrjd.roadmap title="Q1 Plan" start="2026-01-01" end="2026-03-31">

  <$rrjd.lanes>
    <$rrjd.lane name="Frontend" maxRows="2">
      <$rrjd.people>
        <$rrjd.person name="Alice" involvement="80"/>
        <$rrjd.person name="Bob" involvement="50"/>
      </$rrjd.people>
    </$rrjd.lane>
  </$rrjd.lanes>

  <$rrjd.tasks>
    <$rrjd.task label="Dashboard" start="2026-01-15" end="2026-02-15"
      status="in_progress" lane="Frontend"/>
    <$rrjd.task label="Settings Page" start="2026-02-01" end="2026-03-01"
      status="planned" lane="Frontend" rowOffset="1"/>
  </$rrjd.tasks>

  <$rrjd.milestones>
    <$rrjd.milestone label="Beta" when="2026-03-01"/>
  </$rrjd.milestones>

</$rrjd.roadmap>

</$importvariables>
```

This emits the same JSON that `<$resourceplanning>` expects. Save the output to a data tiddler with `<$json-save>` and point the widget at it.

!! Data-driven roadmap with JSON DSL

The real power of the adapter is pulling data from wiki tiddlers via filters. Suppose you have tiddlers tagged `roadmap-task` with fields `start`, `end`, `status`, and `lane`:

```
<$importvariables filter="[[$:/plugins/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/v1/json-dsl-adapter]]">

<$rrjd.roadmap title="Project Roadmap" start="2026-01-01" end="2026-06-30">

  <$rrjd.lanes>
    <$rrjd.lane name="Backend"/>
    <$rrjd.lane name="Frontend"/>
  </$rrjd.lanes>

  <$rrjd.tasks>
    <$list filter="[tag[roadmap-task]]">
      <$rrjd.task
        label={{!!title}}
        start={{!!start}}
        end={{!!end}}
        status={{!!status}}
        lane={{!!lane}}
        tiddler=<<currentTiddler>>
      />
    </$list>
  </$rrjd.tasks>

</$rrjd.roadmap>

</$importvariables>
```

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="tip">
<$fill $name="body">
With filters, adding a new task tiddler tagged `roadmap-task` automatically adds a bar to the chart — no JSON editing required.
</$fill>
</$transclude>

!! Using raw JSON DSL widgets (without the adapter)

You can also use JSON DSL widgets directly if you need full control over the JSON structure:

```
<$json-obj>
  <$json-prop key="title" value="My Roadmap"/>
  <$json-prop key="start" value="2026-01-01"/>
  <$json-prop key="end" value="2026-06-30"/>
  <$json-array key="lanes">
    <$json-obj>
      <$json-prop key="name" value="Backend"/>
      <$json-prop key="maxRows" value="2" type="number"/>
    </$json-obj>
  </$json-array>
  <$json-array key="tasks">
    <$list filter="[tag[roadmap-task]]">
      <$json-obj>
        <$json-prop key="label" filter="[<currentTiddler>get[title]]"/>
        <$json-prop key="start" filter="[<currentTiddler>get[start]]"/>
        <$json-prop key="end" filter="[<currentTiddler>get[end]]"/>
        <$json-prop key="status" filter="[<currentTiddler>get[status]]"/>
        <$json-prop key="lane" filter="[<currentTiddler>get[lane]]"/>
      </$json-obj>
    </$list>
  </$json-array>
  <$json-save $tiddler="MyRoadmap/data"/>
</$json-obj>
```

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info">
<$fill $name="body">
The adapter widgets (`<$rrjd.*>`) are syntactic sugar over these raw JSON DSL calls. Use whichever level of abstraction fits your needs.
</$fill>
</$transclude>

!! Custom width and fixed height

```
<$resourceplanning source="MyRoadmap/data" width="1200" height="600" autoHeight="no"/>
```

!! Overriding status colors

Edit `$:/config/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/status-colors` to change colors:

```json
{
  "blocked": "#ff0000",
  "in_progress": "#2563eb",
  "done": "#16a34a",
  "planned": "#0ea5e9",
  "candidate": "#64748b",
  "on_hold": "#a855f7"
}
```

Custom status keys (like `on_hold` above) work too — any task with `"status": "on_hold"` will use that color.

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="tip">
<$fill $name="body">
The config tiddler ships with defaults. Edit it in the wiki to customise — changes apply on next widget refresh, no restart needed.
</$fill>
</$transclude>

!! Linking tasks to tiddlers

Add `tiddler` fields to make elements clickable:

```json
{
  "lanes": [
    {"name": "Backend", "tiddler": "Teams/Backend"}
  ],
  "tasks": [
    {"label": "API v2", "tiddler": "Projects/API-v2", "start": "2026-01-01", "end": "2026-02-15", "lane": "Backend"}
  ]
}
```

Clicking navigates to the linked tiddler via TiddlyWiki's standard `tm-navigate` message.

</$fill>
</$transclude>

<$fill $name="body">

!! What it does

Orga Tools provides SVG-based visualisation widgets for organisational planning. The first widget is `<$resourceplanning>` — a Gantt-style roadmap chart rendered entirely in SVG, driven by a JSON spec.

!! Features

* ''SVG roadmap chart'' — lanes, tasks, people avatars, milestones, and a "Now" line
* ''Auto-fit height'' — SVG viewBox adjusts to content by default (`autoHeight="yes"`)
* ''Dynamic "Now" line'' — defaults to today's date when not specified in JSON
* ''SVG tooltips'' — hover over tasks, people, milestones, and lanes for details
* ''Configurable status colors'' — override via `$:/config/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/status-colors`
* ''Click navigation'' — clicking tasks, lanes, people, or milestones navigates to linked tiddlers
* ''JSON DSL adapter'' — high-level `<$rrjd.roadmap>` wikitext macros that build the JSON spec via json-dsl widgets
* ''Wikitext source'' — the `source` attribute accepts a tiddler title or inline wikitext (transclusions, macros)

!! Prerequisites

* JSON DSL plugin (dependency, auto-loaded)
* TiddlyWiki >= 5.3.0

!! Quick start

Create a tiddler with JSON content:

```json
{
  "title": "Q1 Roadmap",
  "start": "2026-01-01",
  "end": "2026-03-31",
  "lanes": [
    {
      "name": "Backend",
      "maxRows": 2,
      "people": [
        {"name": "Alice", "involvement": 100}
      ]
    }
  ],
  "tasks": [
    {
      "label": "API Redesign",
      "start": "2026-01-15",
      "end": "2026-02-28",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "lane": "Backend"
    }
  ],
  "milestones": [
    {"label": "MVP", "when": "2026-03-15", "color": "#cc0000"}
  ]
}
```

Then render it:

```
<$resourceplanning source="MyRoadmapData"/>
```

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info">
<$fill $name="body">
The `now` field is optional — if omitted, the "Now" line defaults to today's date. Set `now` explicitly to override, or omit the field entirely to disable it when the current date falls outside the chart range.
</$fill>
</$transclude>

!! Alternative: build the spec with JSON DSL

Instead of writing raw JSON, you can use the [[JSON DSL|$:/plugins/rimir/json-dsl/doc/overview]] plugin to compose roadmap data declaratively in wikitext. Orga Tools ships with a ready-made adapter:

```
<$importvariables filter="[[$:/plugins/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/v1/json-dsl-adapter]]">
<$rrjd.roadmap title="Q1 Roadmap" start="2026-01-01" end="2026-03-31">
  <$rrjd.lanes>
    <$rrjd.lane name="Backend">
      <$rrjd.people>
        <$rrjd.person name="Alice" involvement="100"/>
      </$rrjd.people>
    </$rrjd.lane>
  </$rrjd.lanes>
  <$rrjd.tasks>
    <$rrjd.task label="API Redesign" start="2026-01-15" end="2026-02-28"
      status="in_progress" lane="Backend"/>
  </$rrjd.tasks>
</$rrjd.roadmap>
</$importvariables>
```

Each `<$rrjd.*>` widget maps to a `<$json-obj>` / `<$json-array>` / `<$json-prop>` under the hood. The adapter emits the same JSON structure the widget expects — no manual JSON editing needed. See the //Examples// tab for a full walkthrough.

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="tip">
<$fill $name="body">
The JSON DSL adapter is especially useful when roadmap data comes from wiki tiddlers — you can use filters like `[tag[task]get[start]]` inside `<$json-prop>` to pull field values dynamically.
</$fill>
</$transclude>

</$fill>
</$transclude>

<$fill $name="body">

!! `<$resourceplanning>` widget

|!Attribute |!Default |!Description |
|`source` |`<<currentTiddler>>` |Tiddler title containing JSON, or raw wikitext that produces JSON |
|`width` |`1700` |SVG canvas width in pixels |
|`height` |`980` |SVG canvas height in pixels (ignored when `autoHeight="yes"`) |
|`autoHeight` |`"yes"` |Auto-fit SVG height to content; set `"no"` for fixed height |
|`class` |— |CSS class applied to the wrapper `<div>` |

!! JSON DSL adapter widgets

Import from `$:/plugins/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/v1/json-dsl-adapter`:

|!Widget |!Key attributes |!Description |
|`<$rrjd.roadmap>` |`title`, `start`, `end`, `now`, `debug`, `indent` |Root container — wraps a `<$json-obj>` |
|`<$rrjd.lanes>` |— |Array container for lanes |
|`<$rrjd.lane>` |`name`, `progressText`, `maxRows`, `tiddler` |Single lane object |
|`<$rrjd.people>` |— |Array container for people (inside a lane) |
|`<$rrjd.person>` |`name`, `involvement`, `tiddler`, `avatarUrl` |Single person object |
|`<$rrjd.tasks>` |— |Array container for tasks |
|`<$rrjd.task>` |`label`, `start`, `end`, `status`, `lane`, `rowOffset`, `tiddler`, `milestoneAtEnd` |Single task object |
|`<$rrjd.milestones>` |— |Array container for milestones |
|`<$rrjd.milestone>` |`label`, `when`, `lane`, `tiddler`, `color` |Single milestone object |
|`<$rrjd.validation>` |`show`, `title` |Conditional validation output block |
|`<$rrjd.require>` |`value`, `message` |Emits warning if value is empty |
|`<$rrjd.require-any>` |`a`, `b`, `c`, `message` |Emits warning if all values are empty |

!! Status values

|!Status |!Default color |!Description |
|`planned` |`#13a7e5` (light blue) |Work not yet started |
|`in_progress` |`#0070c0` (blue) |Active work |
|`done` |`#00a651` (green) |Completed |
|`blocked` |`#cc0000` (red) |Blocked by dependency |
|`candidate` |`#6e7b8b` (grey) |Under consideration |

Override via the config tiddler `$:/config/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/status-colors` (JSON format).

!! Config tiddlers

|!Tiddler |!Type |!Purpose |
|`$:/config/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/status-colors` |`application/json` |Status-to-color mapping (editable at runtime) |

</$fill>
</$transclude>

Organisational visualisation widgets for TiddlyWiki. Currently provides a roadmap timeline widget that renders project milestones and tasks on a visual timeline.

!! Key features

* ''Roadmap timeline widget'' — JavaScript-based canvas rendering of project timelines
* ''Configurable status colors'' — customise the visual appearance of timeline items
* ''JSON DSL adapter'' — declarative data binding for widget configuration
* ''Example configurations'' — included examples to get started quickly

!! Prerequisites

* json-dsl plugin must be installed

!! Quick start

Use the roadmap widget with a JSON data source. See the included examples for configuration patterns.
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/v1/_examples/json-dsl-adapter/example-config":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/v1/_examples/json-dsl-adapter/example-config","created":"20260221105924713","modified":"20260305110659169","tags":"","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\import $:/plugins/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/v1/json-dsl-adapter
\whitespace trim
<$let roadmap="Roadmap/Main">

<$rrjd.roadmap
  title={{{ [<roadmap>get[name]] }}}
  start={{{ [<roadmap>get[start]] }}}
  end={{{ [<roadmap>get[end]] }}}
  now="2026-02-20"
  debug="yes"
  showDebug="no"
>

  <!-- optional validation section (prints warnings after JSON output)
  <$rrjd.validation title="Validation">
    <$rrjd.require value={{{ [<roadmap>get[name]] }}} message="Roadmap title/name is missing"/>
    <$rrjd.require value={{{ [<roadmap>get[start]] }}} message="Roadmap start is missing"/>
    <$rrjd.require value={{{ [<roadmap>get[end]] }}} message="Roadmap end is missing"/>

    <$list filter="[tag[project]]" variable="lane">
      <$let laneName={{{ [<lane>get[name]] }}} laneNameFallback={{{ [<lane>splitregexp[/]last[]] }}}>
        <$rrjd.require-any
          a=<<laneName>>
          b=<<laneNameFallback>>
          message={{{ [<lane>addprefix[Lane has no usable name: ]] }}}
        />
        <$list filter="[parent<lane>]" variable="task">
          <$rrjd.require value={{{ [<task>get[start]] }}} message={{{ [<task>addprefix[Task missing start: ]] }}}/>
          <$rrjd.require value={{{ [<task>get[end]] }}} message={{{ [<task>addprefix[Task missing end: ]] }}}/>
        </$list>
      </$let>
    </$list>
  </$rrjd.validation>-->

  <$rrjd.lanes>
    <$list filter="[tag[project]]" variable="lane">
      <$let
        laneName={{{ [<lane>get[name]] }}}
        laneNameFallback={{{ [<lane>splitregexp[/]last[]] }}}
      >
      <$rrjd.lane
        name={{{ [<laneName>length[]compare:number:gt[0]then<laneName>else<laneNameFallback>] }}}
        progressText={{{ [<lane>get[progressText]] }}}
        maxRows={{{ [<lane>get[maxRows]] }}}
        tiddler=<<lane>>
      >
        <$rrjd.people>
          <$list filter="[<lane>get[members]enlist-input[]]" variable="person">
            <$let
              personName={{{ [<person>get[name]] }}}
              personNameFallback={{{ [<person>splitregexp[/]last[]] }}}
            >
            <$rrjd.person
              name={{{ [<personName>length[]compare:number:gt[0]then<personName>else<personNameFallback>] }}}
              involvement={{{ [<person>get[involvement]] }}}
              tiddler=<<person>>
              avatarUrl={{{ [<person>get[avatarUrl]] }}}
            />
            </$let>
          </$list>
        </$rrjd.people>
      </$rrjd.lane>
      </$let>
    </$list>
  </$rrjd.lanes>

  <$rrjd.tasks>
    <$list filter="[tag[project]]" variable="lane">
      <$let laneName={{{ [<lane>get[name]] }}} laneNameFallback={{{ [<lane>splitregexp[/]last[]] }}}>
      <$list filter="[parent<lane>]" variable="task">
        <$let taskLabel={{{ [<task>get[label]] }}} taskLabelFallback={{{ [<task>get[title]] }}}>
        <$rrjd.task
          label={{{ [<taskLabel>length[]compare:number:gt[0]then<taskLabel>else<taskLabelFallback>] }}}
          tiddler=<<task>>
          start={{{ [<task>get[start]] }}}
          end={{{ [<task>get[end]] }}}
          status={{{ [<task>get[status]] }}}
          lane={{{ [<laneName>length[]compare:number:gt[0]then<laneName>else<laneNameFallback>] }}}
          rowOffset={{{ [<task>get[rowOffset]] }}}
          milestoneAtEnd={{{ [<task>get[milestoneAtEnd]] }}}
        />
        </$let>
      </$list>
      </$let>
    </$list>
  </$rrjd.tasks>

  <$rrjd.milestones>
    <$list filter="[tag[project]]" variable="lane">
      <$let laneName={{{ [<lane>get[name]] }}} laneNameFallback={{{ [<lane>splitregexp[/]last[]] }}}>
      <$list filter="[<lane>get[milestones]enlist-input[]]" variable="m">
        <$let msLabel={{{ [<m>get[label]] }}} msLabelFallback={{{ [<m>get[title]] }}}>
        <$rrjd.milestone
          label={{{ [<msLabel>length[]compare:number:gt[0]then<msLabel>else<msLabelFallback>] }}}
          when={{{ [<m>get[when]] }}}
          lane={{{ [<laneName>length[]compare:number:gt[0]then<laneName>else<laneNameFallback>] }}}
          tiddler=<<m>>
          color={{{ [<m>get[color]] }}}
        />
      </$list>
      </$let>
    </$list>
  </$rrjd.milestones>

</$rrjd.roadmap>
</$let>

title: $:/plugins/rimir/orga/resource-planning/widget.js
type: application/javascript
module-type: widget

Resource planning SVG widget for TiddlyWiki
\*/
(function(){

"use strict";

var Widget = require("$:/core/modules/widgets/widget.js").widget;

function svgEl(doc, tag, attrs, text) {
	var el = doc.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", tag);
	if(attrs) {
		Object.keys(attrs).forEach(function(k){
			if(attrs[k] !== undefined && attrs[k] !== null) {
				el.setAttribute(k, String(attrs[k]));
			}
		});
	}
	if(text !== undefined && text !== null) {
		el.textContent = text;
	}
	return el;
}

function svgLinkEl(doc, href) {
	var a = doc.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "a");
	a.setAttribute("href", href);
	// compatibility for older SVG handling
	a.setAttributeNS("http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink", "xlink:href", href);
	a.setAttribute("target", "_self");
	a.setAttribute("style", "cursor:pointer;");
	return a;
}

function twTiddlerHref(title) {
	// Basic internal link format for most TW setups
	return "#" + encodeURIComponent(title || "");
}

function toDate(input) {
	if(input instanceof Date) return new Date(input.getFullYear(), input.getMonth(), input.getDate());
	var parts = String(input || "").split("-").map(Number);
	return new Date(parts[0], (parts[1] || 1) - 1, parts[2] || 1);
}
function addDays(d, days) {
	var x = new Date(d.getFullYear(), d.getMonth(), d.getDate());
	x.setDate(x.getDate() + days);
	return x;
}
function daysBetweenInclusive(a,b) {
	return Math.floor((toDate(b) - toDate(a))/86400000) + 1;
}
function monthLastDay(year, monthIndex0) {
	return new Date(year, monthIndex0 + 1, 0).getDate();
}
function monthAbbr(i) {
	return ["Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec"][i];
}
function clamp(v,min,max) {
	return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, v));
}
function maxDate(a,b) {
	return (toDate(a) > toDate(b)) ? toDate(a) : toDate(b);
}
function minDate(a,b) {
	return (toDate(a) < toDate(b)) ? toDate(a) : toDate(b);
}

function ResourcePlanningWidget(parseTreeNode,options) {
	this.initialise(parseTreeNode,options);
}

function addNavigateHandler(widget, el, title) {
	if(!title) return el;
	el.style.cursor = "pointer";
	el.addEventListener("click", function(ev){
		ev.preventDefault();
		ev.stopPropagation();
		widget.dispatchEvent({
			type: "tm-navigate",
			navigateTo: title,
			navigateFromTitle: widget.getVariable("currentTiddler")
		});
	});
	return el;
}

ResourcePlanningWidget.prototype = new Widget();

/*
Parse + execute attributes
*/
ResourcePlanningWidget.prototype.execute = function() {
	this.computeAttributes();
	this.source = this.getAttribute("source", "");
	this.width = parseInt(this.getAttribute("width","1700"),10) || 1700;
	this.height = parseInt(this.getAttribute("height","980"),10) || 980;
	this.autoHeight = this.getAttribute("autoHeight","yes");
	this.className = this.getAttribute("class","");
};

/*
Read JSON from source tiddler text OR from wikified/transcluded source text
*/
ResourcePlanningWidget.prototype.readSpec = function() {
	var source = this.source || this.getVariable("currentTiddler");
	var text = "";

	// 1) If source is a real tiddler title, keep existing behavior
	var t = this.wiki.getTiddler(source);
	if(t) {
		text = t.fields.text || "";
	} else {
		// 2) Otherwise treat `source` as wikitext (can include transclusions/macros/etc)
		// and render it to plain text
		try {
			text = this.wiki.renderText(
				"text/plain",              // output type
				"text/vnd.tiddlywiki",     // source type
				source,                    // the raw source string (wikitext)
				{
					parentWidget: this,     // important: preserves current variable context
					parseAsInline: false
				}
			) || "";
		} catch (e) {
			return {__error: "Unable to render source as wikitext: " + e.message};
		}
	}

	try {
		var spec = JSON.parse(text);
		return this.normalizeSpec(spec);
	} catch (e) {
		return {__error: "Invalid JSON in source: " + e.message};
	}
};


ResourcePlanningWidget.prototype.normalizeSpec = function(spec) {
	spec = spec || {};
	return {
		title: spec.title || "",
		start: toDate(spec.start),
		end: toDate(spec.end),
		now: spec.now ? toDate(spec.now) : new Date(),
		lanes: (spec.lanes || []).map(function(l){
			return {
				name: l.name || "",
				progressText: l.progressText || "",
				maxRows: l.maxRows || 1,
				tiddler: l.tiddler || null,
				people: (l.people || []).map(function(p){
					return {
						name: p.name || "",
						involvement: p.involvement != null ? p.involvement : (p.percent || 0),
						avatarUrl: p.avatarUrl || null,
						tiddler: p.tiddler || null
					};
				})
			};
		}),
		tasks: (spec.tasks || []).map(function(t){
			return {
				label: t.label || "",
				start: toDate(t.start),
				end: toDate(t.end),
				status: t.status || "planned",
				lane: t.lane || "",
				rowOffset: t.rowOffset || 0,
				textColor: t.textColor || "white",
				milestoneAtEnd: t.milestoneAtEnd || null,
				tiddler: t.tiddler || null
			};
		}),
		milestones: (spec.milestones || []).map(function(m){
			return {
				label: m.label || "",
				when: toDate(m.when),
				lane: m.lane || null,
				color: m.color || "#cc0000",
				tiddler: m.tiddler || null
			};
		})
	};
};

ResourcePlanningWidget.prototype.render = function(parent,nextSibling) {
	this.parentDomNode = parent;
	this.execute();

	var spec = this.readSpec(),
		doc = this.document,
		container = doc.createElement("div");

	if(this.className) {
		container.className = this.className;
	}

	if(spec.__error) {
		container.textContent = spec.__error;
		container.style.color = "crimson";
		container.style.fontFamily = "sans-serif";
		container.style.padding = "8px";
		this.domNodes.push(container);
		parent.insertBefore(container,nextSibling);
		return;
	}

	var svg = this.renderChart(spec, doc);
	container.appendChild(svg);

	this.domNodes.push(container);
	parent.insertBefore(container,nextSibling);
};

ResourcePlanningWidget.prototype.renderChart = function(spec, doc) {
	var self = this;

	var STATUS_COLORS = {
		blocked: "#cc0000",
		in_progress: "#0070c0",
		done: "#00a651",
		planned: "#13a7e5",
		candidate: "#6e7b8b"
	};

	// Merge user-configurable status colors
	var colorConfigTiddler = self.wiki.getTiddler("$:/config/rimir/orga-tools/roadmap/status-colors");
	if(colorConfigTiddler) {
		try {
			var userColors = JSON.parse(colorConfigTiddler.fields.text || "{}");
			Object.keys(userColors).forEach(function(k) {
				if(typeof userColors[k] === "string") {
					STATUS_COLORS[k] = userColors[k];
				}
			});
		} catch(e) { /* ignore parse errors, keep defaults */ }
	}

	// Layout
	var canvasW = this.width,
		canvasH = this.height,
		marginLeft = 40,
		marginRight = 30,
		labelColW = 170,
		gridX = marginLeft + labelColW + 10,
		gridY = 140,
		gridW = canvasW - gridX - marginRight,
		monthHeaderH = 36,
		rowH = 26,
		laneGap = 4,
		legendH = 36,
		bg = "#d9d9d9",
		gridBg = "#cfcfcf";

	// Avatar/header layout
	var avatarSize = 26,
		avatarGapY = 18,
		avatarCols = 3,
		avatarNameSpace = 16,
		laneTitleY = 20,
		laneProgressY = 36,
		dividerY = 46,
		avatarTopPaddingFromDivider = 18,
		avatarTopOffset = dividerY + avatarTopPaddingFromDivider;

	var laneY = {};
	var laneTaskRows = {};

	// Determine required task rows per lane from lane.maxRows and actual task rowOffsets (visible tasks only)
	(spec.lanes || []).forEach(function(lane){
		laneTaskRows[lane.name] = Math.max(1, Number(lane.maxRows) || 1);
	});
	(spec.tasks || []).forEach(function(task){
		// only count tasks that overlap the visible range
		if(toDate(task.end) < spec.start || toDate(task.start) > spec.end) return;
		var neededRows = (Number(task.rowOffset) || 0) + 1;
		if(!laneTaskRows[task.lane]) laneTaskRows[task.lane] = 1;
		laneTaskRows[task.lane] = Math.max(laneTaskRows[task.lane], neededRows);
	});

	function laneHeight(lane) {
		var rowsNeeded = laneTaskRows[lane.name] || Math.max(1, Number(lane.maxRows) || 1);
		var taskSideHeight = rowsNeeded * rowH + 14;
		var people = lane.people || [];
		if(!people.length) return taskSideHeight;
		var rows = Math.ceil(people.length / avatarCols);
		var peopleSideHeight =
			avatarTopOffset +
			(rows - 1) * (avatarSize + avatarGapY + avatarNameSpace) +
			avatarSize +
			avatarNameSpace +
			4;
		return Math.max(taskSideHeight, peopleSideHeight);
	}

	function computeGridHeight() {
		var total = 0;
		(spec.lanes || []).forEach(function(lane){
			total += laneHeight(lane) + laneGap;
		});
		return total + legendH + 20;
	}

	function daysTotal() {
		return daysBetweenInclusive(spec.start, spec.end);
	}
	function xForDate(dt) {
		var total = daysTotal();
		var offset = Math.floor((toDate(dt) - spec.start)/86400000);
		return gridX + (offset/total) * gridW;
	}
	function xForDateEnd(dt) {
		return xForDate(addDays(dt,1));
	}
	function laneRect(laneName) {
		var lane = (spec.lanes || []).find(function(l){ return l.name === laneName; });
		return {x:gridX,y:laneY[laneName],w:gridW,h:laneHeight(lane || {name: laneName, maxRows:1,people:[]})};
	}
	function rowYFor(laneName,rowOffset) {
		var r = laneRect(laneName);
		return r.y + 8 + (rowOffset || 0) * rowH;
	}
	function initials(name) {
		var parts = String(name || "").trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
		if(!parts.length) return "?";
		if(parts.length === 1) return parts[0].slice(0,2).toUpperCase();
		return (parts[0][0] + parts[1][0]).toUpperCase();
	}
	function ellipsize(text,maxChars) {
		var s = String(text || "");
		if(maxChars <= 0) return "";
		if(s.length <= maxChars) return s;
		if(maxChars === 1) return "…";
		return s.slice(0,maxChars-1) + "…";
	}
	function ellipsizeToPx(text, maxPx, fontSizePx) {
		var s = String(text || "");
		if(maxPx <= 0) return "";
		// rough average char width for Arial-like fonts
		var avgCharPx = Math.max(5, Math.round((fontSizePx || 11) * 0.6));
		var maxChars = Math.floor(maxPx / avgCharPx);
		if(maxChars <= 0) return "";
		return ellipsize(s, maxChars);
	}

	var gridH = computeGridHeight(),
		gridMainH = gridH - legendH - 20;

	// Auto-fit SVG height to content
	if(self.autoHeight === "yes") {
		canvasH = gridY + gridH + 10;
	}

	var svg = svgEl(doc, "svg", {
		xmlns: "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg",
		viewBox: "0 0 " + canvasW + " " + canvasH,
		width: canvasW,
		height: canvasH,
		style: "max-width:100%;height:auto;border:1px solid #ddd;background:#d9d9d9;"
	});

	// Background
	svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"rect",{x:0,y:0,width:canvasW,height:canvasH,fill:bg}));

	// Title
	svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"text",{
		x: marginLeft + 220,
		y: 55,
		"text-anchor":"middle",
		"font-family":"Arial",
		"font-size":30,
		"font-weight":"bold"
	}, spec.title || ""));

	// Month header
	svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"rect",{
		x:gridX, y:gridY - monthHeaderH - 6, width:gridW, height:monthHeaderH, fill:"#bfbfbf"
	}));

	var cur = new Date(spec.start.getFullYear(), spec.start.getMonth(), 1);
	while(cur <= spec.end) {
		var monthStart = new Date(Math.max(cur, spec.start));
		var last = monthLastDay(cur.getFullYear(), cur.getMonth());
		var monthEndCandidate = new Date(cur.getFullYear(), cur.getMonth(), last);
		var monthEnd = new Date(Math.min(monthEndCandidate, spec.end));

		var x0 = xForDate(monthStart), x1 = xForDateEnd(monthEnd), xc = (x0+x1)/2;
		var isFirstMonth = cur.getMonth() === spec.start.getMonth() && cur.getFullYear() === spec.start.getFullYear();
		var label = isFirstMonth ? (monthAbbr(cur.getMonth()) + " " + String(cur.getFullYear()).slice(-2)) : monthAbbr(cur.getMonth());

		svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"text",{
			x:xc,y:gridY-20,"text-anchor":"middle","font-family":"Arial","font-size":18
		},label));

		if(monthStart.getTime() !== spec.start.getTime()) {
			svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"line",{
				x1:x0,y1:gridY-6,x2:x0,y2:gridY+gridMainH,stroke:"#222","stroke-width":1,"stroke-dasharray":"6,6"
			}));
		}
		cur = new Date(cur.getFullYear(), cur.getMonth()+1, 1);
	}

	// Grid background
	svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"rect",{x:gridX,y:gridY,width:gridW,height:gridMainH,fill:gridBg}));

	// Weekly verticals (Mondays)
	cur = new Date(spec.start);
	while(cur.getDay() !== 1) cur = addDays(cur,-1);
	while(cur <= spec.end) {
		if(cur >= spec.start) {
			var vx = xForDate(cur);
			svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"line",{
				x1:vx,y1:gridY,x2:vx,y2:gridY+gridMainH,
				stroke:"white","stroke-width":1,"stroke-dasharray":"6,6",opacity:0.8
			}));
		}
		cur = addDays(cur,7);
	}

	// Lane positions + separators
	var y = gridY;
	(spec.lanes || []).forEach(function(lane){
		var h = laneHeight(lane);
		laneY[lane.name] = y;
		svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"line",{
			x1:gridX,y1:y,x2:gridX+gridW,y2:y,stroke:"white","stroke-width":1,"stroke-dasharray":"6,6",opacity:0.8
		}));
		y += h + laneGap;
	});
	svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"line",{
		x1:gridX,y1:gridY+gridMainH,x2:gridX+gridW,y2:gridY+gridMainH,
		stroke:"white","stroke-width":1,"stroke-dasharray":"6,6",opacity:0.8
	}));

	// defs for clips
	var defs = svgEl(doc,"defs",{});
	svg.appendChild(defs);

	// Lane labels + people
	(spec.lanes || []).forEach(function(lane, laneIndex){
		var r = laneRect(lane.name);

		var laneRectEl = svgEl(doc,"rect",{
			x:marginLeft,y:r.y,width:labelColW,height:r.h,fill:"#0d3a6e"
		});
		laneRectEl.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"title",{},lane.name));

		addNavigateHandler(self, laneRectEl, lane.tiddler || lane.name);
		svg.appendChild(laneRectEl);

		var laneTitleEl = svgEl(doc,"text",{
			x: marginLeft + labelColW/2, y: r.y + laneTitleY, "text-anchor":"middle",
			"font-family":"Arial","font-size":14,"font-weight":"bold",fill:"white"
		}, lane.name);
		addNavigateHandler(self, laneTitleEl, lane.tiddler || lane.name);
		svg.appendChild(laneTitleEl);

		if(lane.progressText) {
			svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"text",{
				x: marginLeft + labelColW/2, y: r.y + laneProgressY, "text-anchor":"middle",
				"font-family":"Arial","font-size":10,fill:"white"
			}, lane.progressText));
		}

		svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"line",{
			x1:marginLeft+6,y1:r.y+dividerY,x2:marginLeft+labelColW-6,y2:r.y+dividerY,
			stroke:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)","stroke-width":1
		}));

		var people = lane.people || [];
		var maxBottom = r.y + r.h - 4;
		for(var i=0; i<people.length; i++) {
			var p = people[i];
			var col = i % avatarCols;
			var row = Math.floor(i / avatarCols);

			var px = marginLeft + 8 + col * ((avatarSize + 8) + 8);
			var py = r.y + avatarTopOffset + row * (avatarSize + avatarGapY + avatarNameSpace);

			var personTarget = p.tiddler || p.name;

			if(py + avatarSize + avatarNameSpace > maxBottom) break;

			svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"text",{
				x:px + avatarSize/2,
				y:py - 2,
				"text-anchor":"middle",
				"font-family":"Arial",
				"font-size":9,
				fill:"white"
			}, clamp(Math.round(Number(p.involvement)||0),0,100) + "%"));

			var clipId = "rpw-" + laneIndex + "-" + i;
			var clip = svgEl(doc,"clipPath",{id:clipId});
			clip.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"rect",{x:px,y:py,width:avatarSize,height:avatarSize,rx:4,ry:4}));
			defs.appendChild(clip);

			var personTooltip = p.name + "\nInvolvement: " + clamp(Math.round(Number(p.involvement)||0),0,100) + "%";

			if(p.avatarUrl) {
				var img = svgEl(doc,"image",{
					x:px,y:py,width:avatarSize,height:avatarSize,
					href:p.avatarUrl,
					"clip-path":"url(#" + clipId + ")",
					preserveAspectRatio:"xMidYMid slice"
				});
				// compatibility: set xlink:href too
				img.setAttributeNS("http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink","xlink:href",p.avatarUrl);
				img.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"title",{},personTooltip));
				addNavigateHandler(self, img, personTarget);
				svg.appendChild(img);
			} else {
				var avatarBg = svgEl(doc,"rect",{x:px,y:py,width:avatarSize,height:avatarSize,rx:4,ry:4,fill:"#8ea3bf"});
				avatarBg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"title",{},personTooltip));
				addNavigateHandler(self, avatarBg, personTarget);
				svg.appendChild(avatarBg);

				var initialsEl = svgEl(doc,"text",{
					x:px+avatarSize/2,y:py+avatarSize/2+3,"text-anchor":"middle",
					"font-family":"Arial","font-size":11,"font-weight":"bold",fill:"white"
				}, initials(p.name));
				addNavigateHandler(self, initialsEl, personTarget);
				svg.appendChild(initialsEl);
			}

			svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"rect",{
				x:px,y:py,width:avatarSize,height:avatarSize,rx:4,ry:4,fill:"none",stroke:"white","stroke-width":1
			}));

			var personNameEl = svgEl(doc,"text",{
				x:px+avatarSize/2,y:py+avatarSize+10,"text-anchor":"middle",
				"font-family":"Arial","font-size":8,fill:"white"
			}, ellipsize(p.name,10));
			addNavigateHandler(self, personNameEl, personTarget);
			svg.appendChild(personNameEl);
		}
	});

	// Tasks (clipped to visible timerange)
	(spec.tasks || []).forEach(function(task){
		// Skip tasks outside visible range completely
		if(toDate(task.end) < spec.start || toDate(task.start) > spec.end) return;

		var visibleStart = maxDate(task.start, spec.start);
		var visibleEnd = minDate(task.end, spec.end);

		var x = xForDate(visibleStart),
			x2 = xForDateEnd(visibleEnd),
			yy = rowYFor(task.lane, task.rowOffset || 0),
			w = Math.max(4, x2 - x),
			h = rowH - 2,
			color = STATUS_COLORS[task.status] || "#0070c0",
			taskTarget = task.tiddler || task.label;

		var taskTooltip = task.label + "\n" + visibleStart.toISOString().slice(0,10) + " \u2192 " + visibleEnd.toISOString().slice(0,10) + "\nStatus: " + task.status;

		var taskRectEl = svgEl(doc,"rect",{x:x,y:yy,width:w,height:h,fill:color});
		taskRectEl.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"title",{},taskTooltip));
		addNavigateHandler(self, taskRectEl, taskTarget);
		svg.appendChild(taskRectEl);

		// Shorten label to fit visible bar width
		var textPadding = 6;
		var maxTextPx = w - textPadding * 2;
		var shownLabel = ellipsizeToPx(task.label, maxTextPx, 11);
		if(shownLabel) {
			var taskTextEl = svgEl(doc,"text",{
				x:x+w/2,y:yy+h/2+4,"text-anchor":"middle","font-family":"Arial","font-size":11,fill:task.textColor || "white"
			}, shownLabel);
			addNavigateHandler(self, taskTextEl, taskTarget);
			svg.appendChild(taskTextEl);
		}

		// milestoneAtEnd only if the real task end is within the visible range
		if(task.milestoneAtEnd && toDate(task.end) >= spec.start && toDate(task.end) <= spec.end) {
			var mx2 = xForDateEnd(task.end);
			svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"line",{
				x1:mx2,y1:yy,x2:mx2,y2:yy+h,stroke:"#d21f1f","stroke-width":1.5,"stroke-dasharray":"4,3"
			}));
			svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"text",{
				x:mx2+4,y:yy-4,"text-anchor":"start","font-family":"Arial","font-size":10,fill:"#d21f1f"
			}, task.milestoneAtEnd));
		}
	});

	// Milestones
	(spec.milestones || []).forEach(function(m){
		// only render milestones within visible range
		if(toDate(m.when) < spec.start || toDate(m.when) > spec.end) return;

		var mx = xForDate(m.when), y0, y1;
		var msTarget = m.tiddler || m.label;

		if(!m.lane) {
			y0 = gridY - 40; y1 = gridY + gridMainH;
		} else {
			var rr = laneRect(m.lane);
			y0 = rr.y + 6; y1 = rr.y + rr.h - 6;
		}
		var msTooltip = m.label + "\n" + toDate(m.when).toISOString().slice(0,10);

		var msLineEl = svgEl(doc,"line",{
			x1:mx,y1:y0,x2:mx,y2:y1,stroke:m.color || "#cc0000","stroke-width":1.5,"stroke-dasharray":"5,4"
		});
		msLineEl.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"title",{},msTooltip));
		addNavigateHandler(self, msLineEl, msTarget);
		svg.appendChild(msLineEl);

		var msTextEl = svgEl(doc,"text",{
			x:mx+4,y:y0-4,"text-anchor":"start","font-family":"Arial","font-size":10,fill:m.color || "#cc0000"
		},m.label);
		addNavigateHandler(self, msTextEl, msTarget);
		svg.appendChild(msTextEl);
	});

	// Now line
	if(spec.now && spec.now >= spec.start && spec.now <= spec.end) {
		var nx = xForDate(spec.now);
		svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"line",{
			x1:nx,y1:gridY-50,x2:nx,y2:gridY+gridMainH,stroke:"#d21f1f","stroke-width":1.5,"stroke-dasharray":"5,4"
		}));
		svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"text",{
			x:nx,y:gridY-58,"text-anchor":"middle","font-family":"Arial","font-size":18,fill:"#d21f1f"
		},"Now"));
	}

	// Legend
	var legendY = gridY + gridH - legendH;
	svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"text",{x:marginLeft+175,y:legendY+20,"font-family":"Arial","font-size":12},"Legend"));
	[
		["blocked","Blocked"],
		["in_progress","In Progress"],
		["done","Done"],
		["planned","Planned"],
		["candidate","Candidate"]
	].forEach(function(item, idx){
		var lx = marginLeft + 230 + idx * 118;
		svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"rect",{x:lx,y:legendY+7,width:48,height:14,fill:STATUS_COLORS[item[0]]}));
		svg.appendChild(svgEl(doc,"text",{x:lx+54,y:legendY+19,"font-family":"Arial","font-size":11},item[1]));
	});

	return svg;
};

ResourcePlanningWidget.prototype.refresh = function(changedTiddlers) {
	var changed = this.computeAttributes();
	if(changed.source || changed.width || changed.height || changed.autoHeight || changed["class"]) {
		this.refreshSelf();
		return true;
	}
	// Also refresh if the source tiddler changed
	var sourceTitle = this.getAttribute("source","") || this.getVariable("currentTiddler");
	if(changedTiddlers[sourceTitle]) {
		this.refreshSelf();
		return true;
	}
	return false;
};

exports.resourceplanning = ResourcePlanningWidget;

})();
